message:
fix(prediction): handle already-depleted predictions correctly

- Set DataSources to ["current_usage"] when CurrentPercent >= 100
  so IsValid() returns true for depleted predictions
- Set Confidence to 1.0 for certain depletion
- Explicitly set TimeToDepletion to 0 for depleted cases
- Add explicit WarningNone in PredictWithBurnRate else branch
  for consistency with Predict()
- Add test coverage for depleted prediction validity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
